ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Number of items currently in stock */,
  "cost_gbp" TEXT /* Cost of the product in GBP */,
  "discontinued" TEXT /* Indicates if the product is discontinued (yes/no) */,
  "product_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product in kg */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length x width x height) in cm */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period in months */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_code" TEXT /* Product code referencing the product from the products table */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier ID referencing the supplier from the suppliers table */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for the supplier to deliver the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_code", "supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Product code referencing the product from the products table */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory change was logged */,
  "change_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of change in stock (can be positive or negative) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change (e.g., sale, restock) */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_audit_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_category_links" (
  "product_code" TEXT /* Product code referencing the product from the products table */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID referencing the category from the product_categories table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_code", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Product code referencing the product from the products table */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the default one for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code")
)
